title: Custom Entity – The Stalker
description: A horror AI plugin that adds a stalking entity with smart behavior, jumpscares, and dynamic difficulty.
body:
# 👁️ Custom Entity – The Stalker

A horror-based AI plugin that adds a stalking entity with intelligent behavior, jumpscares, and dynamic difficulty.

---

## 🧠 AI System
- IDLE, STALKING, WATCHING, CHASING states
- Weeping Angel-style mechanic (freezes when looked at)
- Smart pathfinding and targeting

---

## ⚔️ Features
- Melee combat with knockback
- Lightning strike effects
- Jumpscare system
- Camera shake support

---

## 🌙 Spawning
- Spawns at night (or always on high difficulty)
- Per-player cooldown
- Spawns outside player vision

---

## 🛡️ Player Control
- Hunt whitelist (who can be targeted)
- Safe whitelist (protected players)

---

## 🎮 Commands
- /ce spawn  
- /ce reload  
- /ce removeall  
- /ce whitelist add/remove/list  

---

## 🎨 Skins
- Supports custom PNG skins
- MineSkin API integration
- Cached for performance

---

## 🤝 Compatibility
- Paper / Spigot / Bukkit
- Minecraft 1.21.1+
- Soft dependency: Citizens (optional)

---
